name: io.github.chrischall/evite-mcp
description: Evite for Claude — list events, guest lists & RSVPs, RSVP, message guests, and create/edit events

environmentVariables.name: EVITE_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Your Evite login email address. Optional — if omitted, the server falls back to a raw session cookie or the fetchproxy browser bridge (requires being signed in to evite.com).

environmentVariables.name: EVITE_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Your Evite password. Optional — see EVITE_EMAIL.

environmentVariables.name: EVITE_SESSION_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: A raw `cookie:` header copied from a signed-in evite.com tab (alternative to email/password). Used verbatim. Optional.
